calendar.matters:
Motion For Attorney'S Fees.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on plaintiff's motion for attorney's fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

On September 23, 2008, George L. Cohen, Esq. counsel for plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation, was granted leave by the Court to have this present unopposed motion submitted on the papers.
No appearance by defenant Gabriel G. Guilbeaux, a/k/a J. Gabriel G. Guilbeaux.
Good cause appearing, plaintiff's request for attorney's fees in the amount of $23,787.50 is GRANTED.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed order after hearing to the Court for review.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Continued To Aug-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

George L. Cohn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Gabriel G. Guilbeaux, a/k./a J. Gabriel G. Guilbeaux.
Default entered against defendant on May 7, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on May 7, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed on June 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, this MATTER IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 5, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. Prior to the next calling of the case, counsel for plaintiff shall submit to the Court for review, a proposed judgment. If the figures in said proposed judgment are in order, the Court will sign the judgment, and no appearance by counsel shall be necessary.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based Upon Defts' Total Failure To Provide Discovery In This Case As Ordered; And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation's motion for terminating sanctions is granted, no opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. The request for additional monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Based Upon Defendant'S Total Failure To Provide Discovery In This Case As Ordered, And For Monetary Sanctions; Points And Authorities, Table Of Contents; Table Of Authorities And Declaration
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff SLM EDUCATION CREDIT FINANCE's motion for terminating sanctions is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on November 7, 2007 and served by mail. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Mo To Compel Ans To Special Interrogs And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:

George L. Cohn, Esq., for SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation. Plaintiff/Moving Party

HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation's Motion to compel responses to special interrogatories (set #2) is Granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions, set #1 and #2 are ordered admitted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to special interrogatories (set #2) and form interrogatories, (set #1 and #2) within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice And Motions To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set No.2 And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


APPEARANCES:

George L. Cohn, Esq., for SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation. Plaintiff/Moving Party
(telephonic appearance)

HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation's Motion to compel answers to form interrogatories, Set No 2 is Granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions, set #1 and #2 are ordered admitted. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to special interrogatories (set #2) and form interrogatories, (set #1 and #2) within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To 1. Deem Request For Admissions, Set No.2, Admitted And 2. For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


APPEARANCES:

George L. Cohn, Esq., for SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation. Plaintiff/Moving Party
(telephonic appearance)

HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff SLM Education Credit Finance Corporation's Motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted (set #2) is Granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in plaintiff's requests for admissions, set #1 and #2 are ordered admitted. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at deposition is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on May 25, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
